schema.name: Station
schema.description: Reference metadata for a SMHI meteorological observation station. Stations report hourly surface observations of temperature, wind, pressure, humidity, precipitation, and other parameters across Sweden.

station_id.description: SMHI numeric station identifier, unique within the SMHI observation network.

name.description: Human-readable station name as assigned by SMHI, e.g. 'Abisko Aut' or 'Stockholm-Arlanda'.

owner.description: Organization or entity that owns and operates the station, e.g. 'SMHI' or 'Polarforskningssekretariatet'.

owner_category.description: Category of station ownership, e.g. 'CLIMATE' for long-running climate stations or 'AVIATION' for airport stations.

measuring_stations.description: Station classification within SMHI's measuring station network, e.g. 'CORE' for primary network stations.

height.description: Sensor height above ground in meters.

latitude.description: Geographic latitude of the station in decimal degrees.

longitude.description: Geographic longitude of the station in decimal degrees.

schema.name: WeatherObservation
schema.description: Hourly weather observation from a SMHI meteorological station. Multi-parameter observations are assembled from the per-parameter latest-hour API endpoints. Each record contains the most recent values for temperature, wind, pressure, humidity, precipitation, visibility, cloud cover, irradiance, and present weather.

station_id.description: SMHI station identifier for the reporting station.

station_name.description: Human-readable name of the reporting station.

observation_time.description: Timestamp of the observation in UTC, derived from the SMHI epoch millisecond value.

air_temperature.description: Instantaneous air temperature, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 1).

wind_gust.description: Maximum wind gust speed, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 21).

dew_point.description: Dew point temperature, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 39).

air_pressure.description: Atmospheric pressure reduced to mean sea level, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 9).

relative_humidity.description: Relative humidity as a percentage, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 6).

precipitation_last_hour.description: Total precipitation in the last hour, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 7).

wind_direction.description: Wind direction in degrees from which the wind is blowing, measured at 10 m height, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 3).

wind_speed.description: Mean wind speed over 10 minutes measured at 10 m height, reported hourly (SMHI parameter 4).

max_wind_speed.description: Maximum of 10-minute mean wind speed during the hour, measured at 10 m height (SMHI parameter 25).

total_cloud_cover.description: Total cloud cover in oktas (eighths of sky covered), reported hourly (SMHI parameter 16).

present_weather.description: WMO present weather code (ww table 4677) describing current weather phenomena at the time of observation (SMHI parameter 13). Values range from 0 (clear) to 99 (thunderstorm with hail).

sunshine_duration.description: Duration of sunshine during the last hour in seconds (SMHI parameter 10).

global_irradiance.description: Global solar irradiance (direct + diffuse), average over the hour, measured by pyranometer (SMHI parameter 11).

precipitation_intensity.description: Instantaneous precipitation intensity measured by optical or weighing gauge (SMHI parameter 38).

quality.description: Quality flag for the observation as assigned by SMHI: 'G' for approved, 'Y' for suspect.
